creator: rfg@tristatelogic.com
text:
Please nullify, evacuate, terminate, and otherwise crumple and flush this
 PR.  I made a mistake, and it now appears that in fact partedit does do
 the Right Thing when it is asked to partition "Advanced Format" drives.
 (Yes, in this case partition starts _do_ get properly aligned to 4KB
 boundaries.)
 
 My apologies for this incorrect and inappropriate PR.
